common.questions_reply: Have questions? Reply to this email and we’ll help you.
common.ignore_if_not_requested: If you didn’t request this, you can safely ignore this message.
common.unsubscribe: You’re receiving this because you’re subscribed to AutoBlogger updates. {link_start}Unsubscribe{link_end}.

verification.subject: Verify your email address — AutoBlogger
verification.heading: Verify your email address
verification.body: Thank you for creating an account with AutoBlogger! Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.
verification.ignore: If you didn’t create an account, you can safely ignore this message.

password_reset.subject: Reset your password — AutoBlogger
password_reset.heading: Reset your password
password_reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your AutoBlogger account. Click the button below to choose a new password. The link is valid for 30 minutes.

payment_confirmation.subject: Payment confirmed — AutoBlogger
payment_confirmation.heading: Payment confirmed
payment_confirmation.body: Your payment of {amount} has been successfully processed. Thank you for your continued subscription to AutoBlogger.
payment_confirmation.info: Your next billing date is {next_billing_date}. You can manage your subscription at any time from the dashboard.

plan_change.subject: Plan changed — AutoBlogger
plan_change.heading: Your plan has been updated
plan_change.body: Your AutoBlogger subscription has been changed from {old_plan} to {new_plan}.
plan_change.info: The change takes effect immediately. Your new credit allowance and features are now active.

post_generated.subject: Your post is ready — {post_title}
post_generated.heading: Your blog post is ready!
post_generated.body: Your blog post “{post_title}” has been generated and is ready for review.
post_generated.note: You can edit the post before publishing it to your blog.

post_failed.subject: Post generation failed — {post_title}
post_failed.heading: Post generation failed
post_failed.body: Unfortunately, the blog post “{post_title}” could not be generated.
post_failed.note: If the problem persists, please contact support.

post_review.subject: Post awaiting review — {post_title}
post_review.heading: A post is waiting for your review
post_review.body: The blog post “{post_title}” has been generated and is waiting for your approval before publishing.
post_review.note: Review the post and approve it to publish, or decline to discard it.

weekly_summary.subject: Your weekly AutoBlogger summary
weekly_summary.heading: Weekly summary
weekly_summary.body: Here’s a summary of your AutoBlogger activity this week.

credits_low.subject: Credits running low — AutoBlogger
credits_low.heading: Your credits are running low
credits_low.body: You have {credits_remaining} of {total_credits} credits remaining. At this rate, you may run out soon.
credits_low.info: Upgrade your plan or purchase additional credits to keep generating blog posts without interruption.

credits_exhausted.subject: Credits exhausted — AutoBlogger
credits_exhausted.heading: You’ve run out of credits
credits_exhausted.body: Your AutoBlogger credit balance has reached zero. No more blog posts can be generated until you add credits.
credits_exhausted.warning: Scheduled posts will be paused until credits are available.

ab_trial_ending.subject: Your AutoBlogger trial ends in 3 days
ab_trial_ending.heading: Your trial is ending soon
ab_trial_ending.body: Your AutoBlogger trial ends on {trial_end_date}. Upgrade now to keep generating blog posts automatically.
ab_trial_ending.info: After the trial, your scheduled posts will be paused and no new posts will be generated.

ab_payment_failed.subject: Payment failed — AutoBlogger
ab_payment_failed.heading: Payment could not be processed
ab_payment_failed.body: We were unable to process your latest AutoBlogger subscription payment. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.
ab_payment_failed.warning: If the payment is not resolved within 7 days, your subscription will be paused.

ab_welcome.subject: Welcome to AutoBlogger!
ab_welcome.heading: Welcome to AutoBlogger!
ab_welcome.body: Thank you for signing up for AutoBlogger! We’re excited to help you create high-quality blog content automatically.
ab_welcome.info: Get started by adding your first source and configuring your blog settings. AutoBlogger will take care of the rest.
